questionHtml: One of these eight students was disappointed with her result and wished she had practised more. Based on the given data, determine how her score could have been expected to alter had she practised an extra five hours per week.
markschemeHtml:
attempt to find their difference                       (M1)

5×1.36609…  OR  1.36609…h+5+64.5171…-1.36609…h+64.5171…

6.83045…

=6.83  6.85 from 1.37

the student could have expected her score to increase by 7 marks.                       A1


Note: Accept an increase of 6, 6.83 or 6.85.


[2 marks]
